description: Declarative mode registry: the single source of truth for the discriminator (workflowMode/backendKind) PLUS the advisorRouting projection for sk-design. The hub reads this file to resolve a mode; the advisor routes any design query to the single identity sk-design and the hub picks the mode. All five modes route by hub membership (routingClass 'metadata'), so there is no advisor map entry per mode and no merged-identity projection — the advisor does not read this file at runtime.

discriminator.workflowMode: Public hub/mode key. Stable identity used by the hub router and this registry. Carried by every mode.
discriminator.backendKind: Which backend runs the mode: reference-base (cites the shared design reference base under references/) or playwright-extract (runs the embedded Playwright CSS-extraction pipeline).

advisorRoutingContract.routingClass: How the advisor finds the mode. For sk-design every mode is 'metadata' = resolved by hub membership; the advisor routes the single identity sk-design and the hub picks the mode, so no mode carries an advisor map entry or a merged-identity projection.
advisorRoutingContract.packetSkillName: The packet's SKILL.md name. The original flat skill name is preserved as packetSkillName; the packet folder is the short mode key, so folder != packetSkillName is grandfathered here and recorded per mode via grandfatheredFolderMismatch.
advisorRoutingContract.grandfatheredFolderMismatch: true when the packet folder (short mode key, e.g. 'interface') differs from packetSkillName (the preserved flat name, e.g. 'interface'). All five sk-design modes preserve their original flat names, so all five are grandfathered.
